ab: naray cami nya kki’an qbsinux qa sesiy ru, pbkux cami mna lasu blihun tbes kipu qani.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: miyuk cami cqa kki’an qbsinux qani lga, kyalun cami nya sesiy maha:“llasu ga kki’an ni qbhniq, mehong hiya ga kki’an ni maqu, ktayux kya cimu nanaq la.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: mngungu cu maqu hiya, mica ini cu soya ktayux kki’an na maqu.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: piyux wal mu ktalan qa qbhniq qani, mlaka cqa babaw na qhoniq, wal mu ktalan cyan m’abi cqa bling qhoniq qa lqum uyi.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: maki zow ru rme ru ngarux cqa kki’an qbsinux qani, iyat mu kintalan na qabax qbsinux qani, wal mu ktalan lga, mqas cu calay.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: piyux wayal mu psingan qa siyasin qani, pktalun mu yaba ru yaya mu.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: babaw nya lga, rayun mu ktayux yaba ru yaya mu.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
